pi_items.source: Verified against setup_magento.sh which synthetically creates the product Business Laptop Pro with SKU LAPTOP-001.

Verified against setup_magento.sh which creates these SKUs. The relationship type mappings (1=relation, 4=up_sell, 5=cross_sell) are standard Magento 2 catalog_product_link_type IDs, confirmed via Magento documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Magento catalog data populated by setup_magento.sh. The main product SKU is LAPTOP-001. The required links (HEADPHONES-001 and LAMP-001 for related, PHONE-001 for up-sell, and BOTTLE-001, PILLOW-001, YOGA-001 for cross-sell) correctly match the generated SKUs and standard Magento 2 link_type_id mappings (1 for relation, 4 for up_sell, 5 for cross_sell).
